speaker: MATT
raw_text: That brings us to Jester's turn, as you come to consciousness, since you guys are on the same initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That brings us to Jester and Molly.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm unconscious.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to run over to you and put a healing--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't waste a healing potion on me!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What else are we going to do? We can't heal!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can't say anything. You're unconscious.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You hush your mouth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I have healing packs in my bag!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't care. I don't know any of that. That's a healing potion.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I have doughnuts.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to go looking for one in one second. Potion of healing, just a standard 2d4+2. So take six points of heal, you're stabilized.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (gasping) Molly!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Back up, come on!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is a bad day, you guys. Today is really hard.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Jester's now conscious.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I also, definitely lost my two swords now, so those are off.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Lost them?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The swords are not glowing anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You stopped their effect?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I had to feed a healing potion. I had two going, so I needed hands.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You heal ten hit points. Yasha, you come to consciousness on the ground. Your weapon is about two feet from your grasp. The first thing you do, your eyes shoot open and then shoot to your weapon. Natural instinct to defend yourself. It's easily within your grasp. You just have to get up to grab it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, when it appears.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's immune to fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We don't know that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It seemed to take damage, though lesser, when you hit it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Resistant to fire. There's nothing else I can do from where I am.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can you catch fire to the bookcase?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't want to burn the room around us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Jester, Molly?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should I try to heal Yasha, or move the bookcase? I'm the strong one.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Move the bookcase.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: If I set it on fire, someone will still have to pull it anyway. It's not like it's going to disintegrate.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I can use my last spell. I have a 2nd-level spell. I'm going to, bonus action, use Healing Word at 2nd-level on Yasha to bring her back, and then I'm going to run over and try to crash the bookcase down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You go ahead and expend your bonus action. Roll for that. 2d4 plus your Wisdom modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Six plus four. Ten!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys take a short rest of about an hour or so, as you sit down and recover your breath, take a moment to center yourself, tend to your wounds.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Smoke grenade! That's awesome!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I got it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Mushroom cloud, that was great.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Like Rick Moranis in Ghostbusters 2.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is there any way to get in there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It looks like it's holed up. The small hole looks like somebody tried to push through, or previously emerged and bricked what they could. You can't fit through the hole, unfortunately.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to start trying to open it up. I want to go in there, look for things, and break every damn--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait! We should heal, you guys. Should we take a short rest and heal up a little bit?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We should take a short rest. A breather, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Jester, thank you for healing me. I feel like I did not deserve that, but thank you very much.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh! You're welcome. You deserved it so much! You did so good!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh boy, I've already used most of my hit dice. That's crazy.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Four? Okay! You take nine points of poison damage, and you're poisoned for the next hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What's in the urns?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You glance over the inside, and they are empty. They look to be pieces of art that may have meant something to the person who previously--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Will they fit through the hole?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You may have to dig the hole open a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I can dig it open a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you can.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (slamming)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Given a little time, Yasha begins to peel the stones from the wall around it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Those boxes, can I check in those?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, which one? There's one on each side.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll take the right one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you take the right one. You lift the lid, and as you do, you pull it open and powder emerges into your face. Make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Constitution save? That would be a four.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You get a closer look, and you can see parts of the edges are burned. The very bottom parts of it seem to have been committed to some sort of flame. The edges of it are singed a bit. The black collar causes it to be lost at a distant view, but close up, you can see where it's been damaged. There's a fold at the front of it, a small pocket right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what's going on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The art are two large, well-made vases, that you eventually pull through the space here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, that's not as cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't recognize it. These were made a long time ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, they're antique.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Could be worth a pretty penny.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What about that cloak?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I put them in the bag. How about that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You have the folded mantle.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What does the mantle look like?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The mantle is a dark black, a front chest mantle area, with gray stripes coming along the sides and this red embroidered design that emerges from around the neck, all across the front and back of the mantle.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Does it look familiar?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I was hoping.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I come up and see if it has any magic feel to it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I mean, you can make an arcana check to see if you recognize any elements of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I am stowing away the journal in there.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. I'll say yes. You reduce the duration of the poison from an hour to about ten minutes. In the time it takes for guys to finish up, most of the poison eventually begins to wear off. You still look at bit worse for wear.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Of course, I was just about to get it out here. It's for the whole group. We're a team now. Right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's very considerate of you, Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Anything you take on your own time is yours. We're on the clock.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Of course! I would never try to steal from the group. I just--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a bunch of gold and jewels.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey, you know, this is going to take a while, so why don't we put it all down, and I will get to work, okay?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm poisoned. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How much you care to drink is on you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I've got an herbalism kit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's like a purple froth at the corner of her mouth. It's spitting out--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: She's antiqued too. She's covered in ash.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Covered in oil and ash.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I use my herbalism kit to get rid of the poison?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make a medicine check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (spitting) Pah. Pah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're not stealthy, doing this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's 21.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Nope. You see it's been scarred intentionally from the inside. Possibly, whatever flurry of intent that Siff had to burn the book, destroy everything, burn everything from the inside also, was to destroy the circle and allow nothing else to come through. You get the sense that the final moments in this chamber were probably very paranoid.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can you mend the transportation circle?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't think it works quite like that. It has to be a broken thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, and this sort of thing takes a lot of work from very specialized people.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I wonder where it goes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You could mend the big urn that held the ashes of the lich-y thing. Then we can take that urn back and give it to--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: As long as there were no ashes in it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They're all on me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I will say, unfortunately, the urn that was destroyed that contained Siff's remains is a bit large for the Mend spell. You can only mend a foot-by-foot space. The urn was a big old thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Clarification  When Caleb did Detect Magic, did the circle in the center of the room glow at all? Or is it-- It's dead.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The two of you know that in the time you spent traveling down here in the subterranean area, resting and going through these battles-- and you left midday. It's when you had arrived to begin your journey here. It's getting pretty close to dusk. Not quite yet. The sun hasn't set.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We could see what's down the river a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: If we want to go back, our two muscle sisters could get us up this current for sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You could. It would be tiring.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're already out this far. Might as well see where it goes for a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It could be scary. There could be more rock monsters and things.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There are literally going to be rock monsters if we go back the other way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, if we are doing that, then I suggest camping in this chamber before going forward, because we are all bloodied and battered, you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sure. We could do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It has been a really long day so far.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What time is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a survival check, Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I would know what time of day it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You would because of your feat.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And so would I because I rolled an 18!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys travel for about ten or 15 minutes down before another cavern merges with the one you're in. It looks like another side of the river seems to merge with yours.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You keep watch. The four of you guys--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll watch over these guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay, Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The rest of you get into one of the boats, push off, catch up onto the current, and begin to lazily drift further down the cavern.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like this is stupid.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Bye, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: See you never.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We'll be back. We're just taking a little look.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're only going an hour down, tops.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I light a torch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The light picks up and spells out the interior of this chamber.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Keep an eye on the roof, remember?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If the current starts to pick up, we're going to fight it and try to go back, yes?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: As they float away out of earshot, I say to my two friends here: you know, if need be, The Mighty Drei also sounds very cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Are we taking a cat?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! Oh, I don't think it works that far away from him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, Frumpkin is scarfing around my neck right now.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: (Clarota voice) It's been a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll let you know when I get there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's swimming, making his way through at the moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Where is it? I'm so excited. I want to hear your white noise.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: In cold water?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It'll be like a cold peppermint drink. It'll be good.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't think it works like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It does because I've been doing it at home.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You make your way through--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Much better.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go. Keep it thematic. You come up from underneath and you can see, as soon as you come up and reach out your feet and your hands, both of you guys begin to catch soft river floor, and eventually it comes up to a plateau, and this is a small, enclosed chamber in the inside.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (laughter) I've always wanted to do this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Darkvision. Do I see anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It only goes back about ten or so feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (Clarota voice) Welcome to my home.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: At this point in time with the searching it would probably be close to an hour or so.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fjord, even wet you're, like, 150? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I am 185 easy, okay?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Wet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He is very wet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fjord. 150? No?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It was good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Somewhere in the world right now, someone's laughing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I think if you beg for it, it makes it even better.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's even better, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Explain that joke. Explain it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What're you guys doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I think we're good to go back and join the others, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys make your way back, fighting the current. Go ahead and make another constitution check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit. I'm getting real tired, you guys-- Oh, I'm not. I'm not getting tired at all, actually. 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Jester's powering through, no issue. You guys make it back. You join the rest of the crew. You see a mildly damp Mollymauk. Actually the whole crew is damp at this point from being under the waterfall.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How long were they gone for?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You can do that. You guys set up a small camp area, take whatever bedrolls and materials that you have to do the best you can to set up a space to sleep. You find enough of a division in the floor to at least get to a resting point and you guys begin your evening's long rest. Could I have everybody at the table except for Fjord please leave and go take your break a little early?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Caleb, if you're done with that book do you think I could hold on to it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you want to read it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'd love to. Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys pull the boats up on the side, head back inside. Where are you going to set up camp on the inside of the chamber?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How about in the place where we disarmed all the traps? We know that that's safe.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's a bit deep in there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well we can't camp in the staircase.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just inside of the rock collapse?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That is a staircase.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It is? Immediately?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, immediately.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You are a reader?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Then yeah, at the bottom.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, the top-- or the bottom. The bottom?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think at the top, personally.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, because the bottom one with the things, the traps blockers--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Right before the staircase, right inside.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you begin to force it down your gullet, you feel the edge of the blade hit the back of your throat and a moment of pain hits you as it begins to cut through your flesh. At that point, this ravenous hunger begins to build on the inside of your stomach. Though the pain tells you to pull away, you continue to force the blade down. As you pull it down from the hilt, you feel the blood burble up in the back of your throat and spill out of your chin but you continue to push it until the entirety of the blade is consumed within your throat. You close your eyes for a moment and look up at the eye once more. The voice returns to fill, reverberating around you. The pain subsides and it says, "Good." The eye closes. The lid completely cutting of the source, the cold, the liquid, the water around you the sense of being under the ocean again begins to whisk you away. A heavy current begins to pull from behind and you reach out trying to grasp for any hand or foot hold. Yet you have nothing to hold on to. As you feel yourself being dragged into this endless abyss, the dream comes to an end. You wake up. (panting) Everyone else is asleep in the area. No one seems to have woken up from your presence.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Consume. Oh god, am I going to try to swallow the sword?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What do you do, Fjord?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's a large blade, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's about this wide in places. It comes out and it arcs and curves and has jagged edges on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what you mean, consume? Fuck it, I'll turn the blade over and keeping my eyes on the big eye, I'll bring it up to my mouth and open it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's cold to the touch of your tongue, the blade completely absent of any temperature.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The wind blows through the distant tunnels above, and for a minute you all shiver as the cold wind finds its way down below. Except for you, you're fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The guy in Tusk Love had them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He did, yeah. I feel like it's a trait that exemplifies the rougher side of my race, so sometimes I wish I had them, and sometimes I'm glad I don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, well you know for many of us, our early days are always with us. I understand.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is how you see yourself, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I think it's how I'd like to see myself.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, it's how we see you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think you would look fine either way, Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I mean we're too distracted with our own personal damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You saying I should let them grow out?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm saying if you want to, you would look good that way as well. You look good this way, you would look good that way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Co-signed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right, fair. How about, you see me picking at them, or chipping at them or any of that shit, you just say the word and I'll stop.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The two of you are helming it. You know the time of day, even though you are below the surface, keeping tracking of this because of your feat. It's roughly six in the morning. It's very early because you guys went to bed fairly early. You guys begin to make your way up the river now, going against the current, muscling your way up and up further and further still. You come across the area where you had the initial confrontation with the darkmantles and begin to push and push.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but we don't have to do that now! We have a whole boat trip to go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Sword up the butt!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Yep, straight up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Absolutely not.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Just like a puppet!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Is this a bad-- should I stay outside or something?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There is no. We are going on. We are going right through their territory.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If he notices it, then he notices it, if he doesn't, then he doesn't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Then we bribe him with the information on the teleportation circle.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Or he can challenge me, and I can, you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We are a very convincing group, I think we can talk our way through that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm really good at lying.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You have your ways. Well, the morning is getting on, shall we?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's get in the boats.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hans and Franz, will you please muscle us up this stream?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Are you guys taking the same boat arrangements?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Hans and Franz?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Same path as you went last time, not as busy. Nobody else is walking through the halls. It's early enough where there isn't much. You do come past that chamber before where you saw the cages in there and there's two more cages set inside, even larger. One of them is a heavy meshed series of metal. You don't hear anything in there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can we just, forego those? I feel like this is going to be the beginning of a very fruitful relationship, surely.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I understand that, but this is the boss's orders. I'm sorry."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The boss is still asleep, you said.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, she said he was probably awake.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't think you understand. It's the boss's orders. I can't just go against them."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right. Let's go be blindfolded.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We don't want to rock the boat here, by all means.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Thank you. Please." She passes out blindfolds to you guys. You figure out an order of making your way down and as you made your way to this portion of the cavern, you walk back, being lead by Kara through the Underworks.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do I see anything of note through Frumpkin's eyes as we walk?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Bacon, please. Get these friends some bacon! My god. I'll be right down." He goes back into the chamber. You hear some other voices and a slight giggle and then Sorah enters the chamber after him. A few moments pass and then one of the doors on the bottom area opens up and Sorah steps out, holds the door aside and The Gentleman, who's still in his robe but now has pants and boots on, enters the chamber and goes, "(laughter) Well, early risers. I'm not going to lie, we were sad to see you not return sooner and had assumed that perhaps you had not survived so this is a great, gracious celebration of your return." He goes and sits down behind his usual chair.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (fake wolf whistles)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Indeed. Well, have a seat, please. (claps loudly) Some food, please."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll stand.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Just lean up against the wall while.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Bacon. I want bacon.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Of course." He snaps his fingers, and over by the curved stairway that leads down in here, two gentlemen that were sitting there in the shadows, unseen before, sit up. He goes, "Go on!", and they both get up and leave up the stairs. He goes, "I've now initiated my means of getting you folks and most likely, Dolan, off the hook for the murder of the High-Richter. It may take some time, a day or two, maybe more, but have some faith in my abilities. Just lay low for a few days, if you don't mind."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's rolling.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20. Thank you! Yeah! Motherfucking liars!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Unfortunately, we have to take $100 away from 826LA. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry kids. It's really a shame.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We didn't think this through. At that point, he sits back comfortably. "Very well. Thank you so much. I'm impressed. I am happy. Keep the rings. I said you can take something back with you, and you've done your job. You've proven yourselves very trustworthy. Please, at your leisure. Take solace in knowing that your friend, Horris, is safely on his way to Berleben."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Seemingly?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Safely."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do I believe him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an insight check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Come on. There's been one too many "seemingly"s.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is that an 11 or a 17?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 17? 21? Yeah, that's a 17. 21!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's being completely honest.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's being honest!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's great! I appreciate you seeing him to safety.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Of course. Be safe." Finishes his meal, glaring at Nott on your way out. As you guys exit the bottom of The Evening Nip up into the proper top of the tavern, you step out. Looking out, you can see the morning sun has risen. It's still early morning at this point in time. It's probably eight o'clock in the morning at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Baller.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I take the leftover bacon strips, and I shove them in my pocket.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm disappointed that we don't have real bacon right now!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I give half of my bacon to Caleb. Here you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But less, you need the protein.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do you still keep the blood vials that you--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh yes, of course. We keep those for anyone we do business with. Sure. Standard procedure, I'm sorry."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's fine, Yasha. After all, I have an empty vial with his saliva in it, so we have that too.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He just stares.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Thank you for your consideration and time. We'll be in touch, shall we?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you guys begin to walk along the streets of Zadash here in the morning air, the cloud cover in the sky still gray, sunless, cool. You can see the mist of the town is now finally burning off, but the gray day is still cool and welcoming. You're going to Dolan's house? You make your way towards Dolan's, trying to still dodge too much attention from the crownsguard, which thankfully--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and before he died, he gave me something that I think Dolan would want to have. Ulog, before Ulog died.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Yeah, of course. Head back that way.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: As we get clear of the bar, (popping) I'm going to get down off of Yasha. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You've been waiting for that for too long.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's very strange how you're very dense.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's all muscle.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I feel it's a lot heavier than you look.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm a cool 45 pounds, yo!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You should probably take a bath.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I guess so.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nott, I know you don't like water, but this is an extreme version.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe I could wipe myself clean with a dry towel.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think probably at least a damp towel?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is surprising coming from me, but I agree with that sentiment. You are covered in dead person.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Several.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Several dead people.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Specifically their feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'll think about it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Not too strong at this point. They still are trying to prevent people from entering and exiting, but there are still patrols that go through. You make your way carefully through, this point in the morning, towards the exterior of Dolan's hut.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You should probably take a bath.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I guess so.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'll think about it.

preceding_turns.text: As you guys begin to walk along the streets of Zadash here in the morning air, the cloud cover in the sky still gray, sunless, cool. You can see the mist of the town is now finally burning off, but the gray day is still cool and welcoming. You're going to Dolan's house? You make your way towards Dolan's, trying to still dodge too much attention from the crownsguard, which thankfully--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Especially Molly and I.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A moment passes, and the door (lock clicks, creak). Dolan's head peeks out. "Gentlemen, it's good to see you. What news have you?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I think he was trying to upset the government, right? Create fractures, hope pressure would make things snap in the end?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I hope so. Feels like a big task for one person. How would he have those connections?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Maybe he's been hedging his bets for a while. Good to keep in mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys come up to the exterior of Dolan's home. It's dark on the inside.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'd normally, but I feel like he knows you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You come with me because you've spoken to him more than I have.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Walk up. Double tap, followed by a single.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The third of Fessuran is about five days away.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You literally just-- that's all that's on there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's my job."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hey!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ah!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Where do we sign up for the Victory Pit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't know."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Tell me. You know!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You want to tell her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an intimidation check. Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We had a long-ass night.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: With advantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Marisha, your theme with children continues.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: She is not a child!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What am I doing, intimidation? 14. She is not a child.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (Stammering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: There's a rec center, community service--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, at the Victory Pit. It's in the Pentamarket, probably. I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thanks, it's all you had to tell me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: She takes the paper from Yasha and darts off down the street.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She's not a verbal learner.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I liked her.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I could tell.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I start yelling out  The third of the Fessuran is the end of the harvest!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we know what day it is today?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hide your kids! Hide your wife!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys return to The Leaky Tap and we'll say for the time being, we're going to have a few days of downtime. If there's anything specifically you want to do, that's not story-centric.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

preceding_turns.text: I liked her.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I could tell.

preceding_turns.text: I start yelling out  The third of the Fessuran is the end of the harvest!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hide your kids! Hide your wife!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The third of Fessuran is about five days away.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There's a Victory Pit!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Passion Pit on the third of Fessuran!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A moment later, two crownsguard come rushing, blades drawn, behind the clerk, who's pointing towards the front of the building, and they rush past you in the interior and begin to look around. They both split on the inside and begin going through the different rooms. It seems not only did he not believe you, but dropping the name of the Myriad in a public space like that, that's immediate call to the guard for these guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (Sean Connery voice peters out) You don't want his trouble with the Myriad to spill over to you, do you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: His eyes go wide. "We have no business--"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fetch him. Now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What happened to Sean Connery?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I fucking lost it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (as Sean Connery) Fetch him now. I'm a Russian sub commander.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well. I'll go fetch him." He walks past you out of the--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (as Sean Connery) Do your best. Losers always whine about their best.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He walks around you and exits the front of the facility and begins walking down the road, out of sight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll turn and follow him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (as Sean Connery) I cast Hexblade.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Bee-lining straight to the nearest crownsguard.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I will turn on my heel and use my Mask of Many Faces to turn into a lovely woman.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Anything else you wish to do over the next few days?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does that always happen when you pray to this lady?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Not often, but perhaps she smiles upon you."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She does. I know she does because she likes me so much because I worship her real good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right. Well, have a good day." He gets up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You too.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, the rest of the funeral procession is now returning to the shrine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shit. Damn it! Is there anything to tuck a pamphlet into?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, you can tuck it under any of the various offering bowls.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'll do that at least.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's literally a cadaver that just went into the building. Not to give you ideas.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Now you know, perhaps another time you can come by and try it again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I'm going to try some other time.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The two of you that have ingested the skein-- Ten minutes pass, and the edges of your vision begin to cloud, and as you sit for a moment your body begins to feel a bit weird. Nausea creeps in a bit. Then, a very faint snow of dust in your vicinity begins to coat. You know the Upside Down? Where there's that weird material floating around.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm holding it in my fucking hand. Don't you see it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, how much is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No, you guys go.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm not going to take it. I was letting you know I'm bought it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh well here. I always partake what--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean we could poison somebody later. That would be fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, it's a little late, because I already took mine. I'm waiting to see what's happening.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait. When Beau hears that she goes--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two of them have taken it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Whoever's sober, keep us out of trouble.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yasha!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, there's something I need to go do. You guys get started and I'll--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Oh no, Yasha you always do this, no! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Somehow she knows you, you always do this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Bullshit!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I know, but you know I always take it and I never feel anything. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Where do you go, Yasha?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm excited.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: In the best interest of keeping a low profile for the next few days, you both wander out into the city streets, altered on--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's not quite like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You can see really cool things.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As this happens, this translucent piranha-faced serpent scoots by, this ghastly looking angler fish creature like-- (gasping breathing).

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: "Hey Steve."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going for a walk.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Molly, how long does this last?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have no idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck. This is it. This is the rest of our lives.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we saying this is night one, of a couple of days of piddling around?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I thought that this was the first night, and this was our celebratory night.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, this is more of a downtime period, so I'm trying to get through events.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm grabbing a little drink downstairs, and then I'm going to go walk in whatever direction seems the most interesting shit outside is in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I join Molly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm babysitting them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to follow behind and throw pebbles at them from behind.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you guys begin to wander through the Interstead Sprawl, once again, the strange shapes pass through your peripheral. You occasionally hear this chattering and distant chuckling, this weird alien laughter. There seems like drifting spiritual energy that freezes your blood as you pass by. It's a really uncomfortable sensation. For about an hour or so you wander in this space. At the end of the hour I need both of you to make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: "Hey Steve."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going for a walk.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Molly, how long does this last?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have no idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck. This is it. This is the rest of our lives.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we saying this is night one, of a couple of days of piddling around?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I thought that this was the first night, and this was our celebratory night.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, this is more of a downtime period, so I'm trying to get through events.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm grabbing a little drink downstairs, and then I'm going to go walk in whatever direction seems the most interesting shit outside is in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I join Molly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm babysitting them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to follow behind and throw pebbles at them from behind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In the best interest of keeping a low profile for the next few days, you both wander out into the city streets, altered on--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: In our hoods and our boring cloaks!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, this is throughout a week so if you wanted to pull the map out--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: To the north?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Assaults on the garrisons, yeah. Northeast of where you are. Further east more, east, little bit north. You have a map. You can look. You guys bought a map.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hey, you want to see this map? You're not with me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is an entire three day weekend.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: To Felderwin? How big a package? For a week's worth of travel, it'll cost you about five gold, not too much.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will gladly give you money, but first-- I'm going to cast Disguise Self, and turn myself into looking just like a normal halfling little girl and spend an hour at a cafe just having lunch and being a normal person.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Aww.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Then after that, I'm going to go, and is there any place if I investigate for a while, is there any place, or service, or person, or anything that can send a package long distance safely? Money being no object.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are a few facilities in which there is a parcel system that travels between the larger cities and can go to outskirt cities, but those are a little more expensive. Yeah, that does exist.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How much to get a package to Felderwin?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Of course. I may not be here in a month or so--"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I never said I show pity. I wanted to know what the hell this artifact was that they were after. Figured you here at the Cobalt Soul would know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Unfortunately, the detailed business of the Cerberus Assembly is very carefully guarded and outside of our jurisdiction, but we're doing our best to keep an eye in case anything slips through the cracks. They do a lot of good, but I don't trust a mage that powerful."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We wouldn't have any records on some Xhorhasian artifact that apparently keeps them alive?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "None that I've come across."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Keep your ear out. If you encounter another one of these things-- these objects-- or at worse, another one of these Cricks, bring what it has, bring it to us."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right. Thank you, Dairon.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It gives you-- the Fragment only lasts for eight hours. You can only give out one Fragment per day, so--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Once per day it can grant one person a luck point.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We can pass it around!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ultimately, after an attack roll is made against a creature they can expend their Fragment of Possibility to roll and additional d20 to see if the attacker hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're like chipping away at it? Like an ice sculpture?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It is like one luck. That lasts for eight hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It grants you this mote of energy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We could literally-- we could each of us every day pass it to a different person and then we could concentrate on it and we could have the Fragment.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I able to tell if that is correct?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The following day, through your various lowkey journeys, you catch another town crier wandering through the town, shouting, "Murderers of the High-Richter brought to justice. By the crown's protective eye, Zadash is free from these treacherous cut-throats!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That was a lot of advice. I mean, it is no secret that I like these people, so we are in good company. This is working out. You are, you know, you are capable-- oh dear. I'm going to go to bed now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Your son is just the cutest.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's not my son!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Definitely heard that. Awkward and weird and makes no sense but I will-- oh, this is my room! You have to go to your room!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (sing-song) Okay, well goodnight then!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Goodnight.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Goodnight, Caleb-- If you need anything I'll just be in another room--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Get out! Just go! Just leave!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Over the next few days, the Crownsguard and the Righteous Brand, which is the name of the military of the Empire-- the presence at the gates of Zadash has dwindled to normal. The backed up caravans and travellers begin to wash into the city once more in preparation for the Harvest Close festival, now only but a few days away. You watch as strands of linen all of the colors of autumn are affixed between street arches and lantern poles; a celebratory display, far less fancy, but more widespread than the Harvest Close Gala not but a week before in the Tri-Spires. That's where we're going to pick up next week! (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (sing-song) Okay, well goodnight then!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Goodnight.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Goodnight, Caleb-- If you need anything I'll just be in another room--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Get out! Just go! Just leave!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The following day, through your various lowkey journeys, you catch another town crier wandering through the town, shouting, "Murderers of the High-Richter brought to justice. By the crown's protective eye, Zadash is free from these treacherous cut-throats!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Who was it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Who was it who killed her?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) "I don't know! I'm just told to tell this!"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) What does it say?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's all it says again!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (fearful shout)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is the next morning?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is the next morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: How do they give you more information? Just a headline; there's nothing else!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Over the next few days, the Crownsguard and the Righteous Brand, which is the name of the military of the Empire-- the presence at the gates of Zadash has dwindled to normal.
